source_note_model: Source: George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSC Meetings Files, OA/ID 90001-005, NSC0020-May 25, 1989-Counter Narcotics in Peru, Review of National Security Review 12-Section IV Regarding Arms Control Implications of Defense Strategy [2]. Secret. Prepared by Davis. Copied to Quayle and Sununu. According to the President's Daily Diary, on May 25 Bush presided over a meeting of the National Security Council in the Cabinet Room lasting from 9:39-11:04 a.m. No minutes were found.
